Sign in

Amalfi Coast, Italy

Terrazza
di Sole

La dolce vita, elevated.

Discover

Rooms with private balconies and floor-to-ceiling sea views

Cliffside Suites

Each suite is a sanctuary of hand-painted Vietri ceramic details, linen-draped beds, and terraces that spill into the Mediterranean sky.

Treatments infused with local lemon and olive essences

Limonaia Spa

Nestled in a converted 18th-century lemon house, our spa channels centuries of Mediterranean wellness traditions.

Michelin-adjacent tasting menus from the sea

Cucina della Costa

Hand-caught seafood at dawn, heirloom tomatoes still warm from the sun. Our chef transforms the Amalfi terroir into an experience.

The legendary Path of the Gods, with gourmet picnics

Sentiero degli Dei

Walk the trail that connects heaven and earth. Our guides lead you along ancient paths carved into dramatic cliffs.

Find Us on the Coast

Perched 150 meters above the Tyrrhenian Sea, between Positano and Praiano.

Via Terrazza 42, 84017 Positano SA
40.6280° N, 14.4850° E
Terrazza di Sole

A boutique cliffside hotel where the Amalfi Coast reveals its most intimate secrets.
